meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: SaaS Pricing for Beginners
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing strategies to scale your freelance business. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to automate your revenue models.
content.answer_block: SaaS pricing isn't about guesswork; it's about value-based tiers. By leveraging Antigravity to model your financial logic and Claude Code to implement Stripe integrations, you transform pricing from a complex hurdle into an automated, high-converting engine that justifies premium client fees and maximizes your recurring revenue.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect feature set, but the silence from your client’s bottom line is deafening. You aren't just missing a pricing model; you're missing the psychological bridge between your code and your client's profitability. Most freelancers treat pricing as an afterthought, leaving thousands of dollars on the table.

It’s time to stop guessing. With the right architecture, pricing becomes a repeatable, scalable asset you can sell as a service. We will use Antigravity to architect your tier logic and Claude Code to deploy production-ready payment infrastructure, turning your 'no-knowledge' barrier into your strongest competitive advantage.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Don't price by features. Price by the business problem solved. Use Antigravity to map user personas to specific value outcomes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS pricing consultant. Create a 3-tier pricing strategy for a B2B SaaS tool based on 'Usage-based', 'Seat-based', and 'Enterprise' models. Provide a JSON schema for these tiers including feature gating logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a TypeScript interface for the pricing tiers defined in my Antigravity file.'

steps.title: Architect Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Set up a clean, scalable Stripe integration that supports your defined tiers without spaghetti code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a robust Stripe integration architecture for a Next.js app. Include webhooks for subscription lifecycle events (created, updated, canceled).
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the Stripe webhook handler in src/app/api/webhooks/route.ts based on the architecture provided.'

steps.title: Implement Dynamic Pricing Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject logic that checks user limits against their current subscription tier in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware function that checks if a user's current usage exceeds their plan limits defined in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Apply this middleware to the API routes protecting usage-heavy features.'

steps.title: Automate Trial-to-Paid Conversion
steps.description: Build an automated email trigger sequence based on usage milestones, not just time-based trials.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a trigger logic for a 'nudge' email when a user hits 80% of their plan capacity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a service function that triggers a Resend email notification when usage thresholds are met.'

steps.title: Stress Test Pricing Edge Cases
steps.description: Simulate subscription upgrades, downgrades, and payment failures to ensure your app doesn't break.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a list of 10 edge cases for SaaS pricing, including mid-cycle upgrades and failed credit card retries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Write unit tests for these 10 edge cases using Vitest.'

pro_tips: Always offer an 'Annual' toggle that prices out to 10 months to maximize upfront cash flow.
Implement 'Feature Gating' at the API level, not just the UI, to prevent bypasses via API calls.
Use a 'Contact Us' button for the Enterprise tier to capture high-intent leads manually before automating.
Never hardcode prices; fetch them dynamically from your Stripe API objects to allow instant pricing adjustments.
Include a 'Usage Overage' warning system to build trust rather than hitting users with surprise invoices.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing model to a staging environment, run a load test on your webhook handlers, and present the automated dashboard to your client to prove value.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start building for impact. Master these workflows to command higher rates and deliver professional-grade SaaS products. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
